rag_rules: Fix AGREE diagnostics by resolving named thing type errors through visible identifiers or helper declarations in the same annex
Move implementation-level bindings from component type annexes to implementation annexes when diagnostics reference subcomponent paths or implementation-specific features
generic_rules: Only reference visible AADL features or helper declarations within the same AGREE annex scope
Ensure type consistency between assumed types and actual expression types in AGREE contracts
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers not present in the analyzed model
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Implementation-level guarantees should reference valid outputs or assignments in implementation scopes
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture elements to resolve AGREE type errors; instead, fix root causes or remove invalid clauses
Do not reference subcomponent ports or implementation paths in component type annexes
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about property associations
AGREE validator diagnostics about annex placement
